findings.evidence: `rg` shows the existing source at `TauCeti/Algebra/AlgebraicGroup/DiagonalizableGroupBaseChange.lean:73` defining `baseChangePointsMulEquiv`, followed by apply, inverse-on-tmul, single-generator, mapValue, and inverse mapValue lemmas at lines 89, 102, 113, 124, and 136; the new file repeats the same sequence at lines 70, 80, 90, 107, 119, and 131 but only cites `AlgHom.baseChangePointsMulEquiv` and `RootsOfUnityGroup.pointsMulEquiv` at lines 44-47.
findings.fix: Add `TauCeti.DiagonalizableGroup.baseChangePointsMulEquiv` / `TauCeti.Algebra.AlgebraicGroup.DiagonalizableGroupBaseChange` to the References or construction paragraph as the specialization pattern being adapted.
findings.issue: The References section does not credit `TauCeti.DiagonalizableGroup.baseChangePointsMulEquiv`, although this file closely mirrors `DiagonalizableGroupBaseChange.lean` in declaration order and proof pattern.

summary: The new base-change file credits the generic base-change and roots-of-unity equivalences, but omits the existing Tau Ceti base-change specialization whose API and proof plan it closely follows.
